Electronics Case

Aluminum Housing and Thermal Structure for Electronics

aluminum housing / thermal structure / mounting interface

IndustriesElectronics
Part Functionaluminum housing / thermal structure / mounting interface
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC housing machining, heat-dissipation features, anodizing coordination and CMM inspection

Project Scenario

The electronics housing combined enclosure structure and thermal features, so machining references and finishing requirements were reviewed together.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The machined housing supported both thermal review and assembly fit testing.
